title: typeobject: obj.__weakref__ (subtype_getweakref) reads the weakref list head without a lock; races with weakref create/destroy
description: subtype_getweakref (the __weakref__ getset) reads the object's weakref list head (*weaklistptr at obj+tp_weaklistoffset) with a plain unlocked non-atomic load and Py_NewRefs the raw head pointer. insert_head (create) and clear_weakref_lock_held/FT_ATOMIC_STORE_PTR (destroy) mutate that same slot under LOCK_WEAKREFS. Reading obj.__weakref__ concurrently with weakref.ref(obj)/teardown on a shared object is a data race on the list head.
sites: Objects/typeobject.c subtype_getweakref:4079 (READ: `if (*weaklistptr == NULL)` -- plain, unlocked, non-atomic load of the weakref list head)
Objects/typeobject.c subtype_getweakref:4082-4083 (READ+INCREF: `result = *weaklistptr; return Py_NewRef(result)` -- hands the raw head pointer to Py_NewRef with no lock / no _Py_TryIncref)
Objects/weakrefobject.c insert_head:323 (WRITE: `*list = newref` under LOCK_WEAKREFS -- weakref creation face)
Objects/weakrefobject.c clear_weakref_lock_held:87 (WRITE: `FT_ATOMIC_STORE_PTR(*list, self->wr_next)` under LOCK_WEAKREFS -- weakref teardown face; the write side in the original fleet vehicle)
race_kind: unsynchronized read of shared internal state (missed FT-hardening: locked/atomic writers vs plain unlocked reader)
shared_state: per-object weakref list head pointer at obj + tp_weaklistoffset (the __weakref__ slot)
severity: low-medium (confirmed TSan data race on read-only-looking obj.__weakref__; plausible use-after-free because the unsynchronized head pointer is passed to Py_NewRef without lock/_Py_TryIncref, colliding with concurrent weakref teardown; no crash observed in the TSan build)
repro_reliability: deterministic (exit 66 every run; SUMMARY always subtype_getweakref:4079)
suggested_fix: read the head under LOCK_WEAKREFS(obj) and incref with _Py_TryIncref (mirroring _PyWeakref_GetWeakrefCount / try_reuse_basic_ref), returning None if the head is mid-teardown; a bare FT_ATOMIC_LOAD_PTR silences the TSan race but does not close the incref-of-a-dying-weakref UAF window
notes: Straggler from the weakref free-threading hardening: writers (insert_head, clear_weakref_lock_held) and the count/reuse readers (_PyWeakref_GetWeakrefCount:48, try_reuse_basic_ref:349) synchronize via LOCK_WEAKREFS + FT_ATOMIC_STORE_PTR / _Py_TryIncref, but the __weakref__ getset reader subtype_getweakref was left with a plain load. Reproduced stdlib-only with weakref.ref(obj, cb) (callback => non-reusable ref => real insert_head/clear churn) + obj.__weakref__. Audit other direct tp_weaklistoffset dereferences outside LOCK_WEAKREFS.

related_issues.note: 22 FT races umbrella -- subtype_getweakref is item; PR #150247 'Fix race in subtype_getweakref'

assessment: Real (potential UAF: Py_NewRef on raced head, no _Py_TryIncref). ALREADY REPORTED #149816/PR#150247. Not for separate filing.
